name: testigo
description: Testigo — From Intent to Proof. Verifiable evidence for work done by humans and AI agents together.

plugins.name: testigo
plugins.description: Ambient intent-to-proof witnessing for Claude Code sessions: hash-chained local evidence ledger, case linking, and signed proof packets verifiable in any browser. Zero dependencies (Node ≥ 20). Captures prompts, tool calls, results and turn ends; approvals are honestly out of scope (hooks can't see the permission dialog).
